arts.ttl: Sources: Spurs make first offer for Kolo Muani
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have received a first offer from Tottenham for their France forward Randal Kolo Muani, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Arsenal outcast 'is in talks to join European giants' - with the Gunners 'open to a loan deal with an obligation to buy'
arts.sum: The Gunners are looking to revamp their squad, with Mail Sport revealing earlier today that Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi is set to join the club this summer.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus set to miss rest of season after Arsenal confirm ACL diagnosis
arts.sum: The Brazilian is likely to miss the rest of the current campaign – and possibly some of next season as well.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Jesus to undergo surgery after ACL injury
arts.sum: Arsenal forward Gabriel Jesus will undergo surgery after sustaining an anterior cruciate ligament injury.

arts.ttl: Arsenal CONFIRM Gabriel Jesus' ACL injury and say when he will undergo surgery - after Mikel Arteta revealed club's transfer market plans on back of huge blow
arts.sum: Jesus was forced off on a stretcher during Arsenal's FA Cup exit to Manchester United on Sunday after a first-half collision with Bruno Fernandes.

arts.ttl: Arsenal confirm Jesus suffered ACL injury
arts.sum: Arsenal have confirmed Gabriel Jesus suffered an ACL injury in the FA Cup defeat to Manchester United on Sunday and is set to undergo surgery in the coming days.

arts.ttl: Arsenal release Gabriel Jesus injury statement as Gunners' worst fears confirmed
arts.sum: The Brazilian forward had to be taken off on a srether in the FA Cup third round defeat to Manchester United, and is now set for extended spell on the sidelines

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'open' to defender exit amid Borussia Dortmund, Inter Milan interest
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Oleksandr Zinchenko is reportedly attracting interest from Borussia Dortmund, who are now battling Inter Milan for the loan services of the Ukrainian.

arts.ttl: ‘Get rinsed’: Ian Wright says Arsenal should overpay and sign ‘incredibly talented’ striker now
arts.sum: Arsenal need to freshen up their attack. The Gunners are struggling in front of goal at the moment. They failed to score from open play...

arts.ttl: “Liverpool were close” – Fabrizio Romano reveals how Arsenal moved into pole position for transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool were reportedly close to sealing the transfer of Martin Zubimendi last summer, but Arsenal are now leading the race for the Real Sociedad midfielder. That’s according to Fabrizio Romano in his latest exclusive video piece for the Daily Briefing, with the Italian journalist explaining how advanced the Gunners now are in getting this deal […] The post “Liverpool were close” – Fabrizio Romano reveals how Arsenal moved into pole position for transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.
